temporal_description: (00:00-00:05) A dark green Rolls-Royce sedan, with license plate AT 333, drives slowly on a wet, reflective city street at night. The scene is set in a futuristic, neon-drenched metropolis with towering, dark skyscrapers. The camera pans to follow the car as it moves from the background to the foreground, its headlights cutting through the gloom. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes the film's futuristic, noir-inspired setting and introduces a key element: a luxury car, suggesting wealth and mystery.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A dramatic, orchestral score with a prominent, wailing siren sound, creating a sense of urgency and tension.)
